steps.title: Read the exponential multiplier
steps.content: In $f(t)=48{,}000(2)^{t/820}$, the factor $2^{t/820}$ counts doublings from the initial population.

steps.title: Set one doubling
steps.content:
For the population to double once, the exponent on $2$ must be $1$:
$$\frac{t}{820}=1$$
$$t=820$$
The answer is B.
